topic: WhatsApp Business integration — how client requests flow into a tracked case instead of a group chat
format: Lead with a quote or question from a customer, then explain the feature built in response
post:
"3 client requests. 2 follow-ups. 1 missed Ministry deadline. All buried in the same WhatsApp group."

Ops directors across Oman and the GCC say this to us constantly.

So we built a fix.

When a client sends a WhatsApp message — a service request, a document follow-up, a complaint — SmartPro Hub automatically converts it into a tracked case inside the platform.

No copy-pasting. No "who replied to this?" No requests disappearing under 200 unread messages.

Every case gets an owner, a status, and a timestamp. The client sees updates through a white-label portal. Your team works from a shared queue, not someone's personal phone.

That's where the real difference shows up: accountability.

A WhatsApp group has no audit trail. A tracked case does. When a Ministry of Labour deadline gets missed or a work permit renewal falls through, you know exactly where the breakdown happened — and who dropped it.

SmartPro Hub helps Oman and GCC businesses replace scattered WhatsApp workflows with one connected system, from client intake to resolution, fully bilingual in Arabic and English.

Starting at OMR 12/month. 14-day free trial, no credit card.

How many open client requests are sitting unanswered in your team's group chats right now?

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=general
